sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Inuvo and FreeWheel Announce Integration to Advance IntentKey’s Programmatic Decisioning
feed.summary: Inuvo and FreeWheel have announced an integration to enhance programmatic media buying through Inuvo’s IntentKey AI. This collaboration embeds IntentKey’s AI-driven models of consumer intent directly into FreeWheel's Buyer Cloud bidding process, enabling advertisers to make real-time, impression-level decisions based on predicted interest and relevance. The integration aims to provide advertisers with greater control, flexibility, and performance in the programmatic advertising landscape by allowing custom execution and increased transparency.

feed.title: Here's What to Expect From Jacobs Solutions' Next Earnings Report
feed.summary: Jacobs Solutions Inc. (J) is set to announce its fiscal second-quarter 2026 earnings, with analysts projecting a 14.7% rise in EPS to $1.64. The company has a history of surpassing Wall Street's EPS estimates, and its full-year EPS is expected to grow by 16.5% in fiscal 2026. Despite underperforming market indices, analysts hold a "Moderate Buy" rating for J, with a significant potential upside in its stock price.

feed.title: Cummins Unveils RT-160 HE Tandem Drive Axle
feed.summary: Cummins Inc. introduced the Meritor RT-160 HE tandem drive axle at Truck World, designed for heavy linehaul applications to improve efficiency while maintaining capacity. This new axle features the Meritor Lube Management System, which reduces internal losses and lowers oil operating temperatures, leading to a 1% efficiency gain over its predecessor. The RT-160 HE is slated for production in the first quarter of 2027.

feed.title: Linde PLC (NASDAQ:LIN) Short Interest Update
feed.summary: Linde PLC (NASDAQ:LIN) experienced a significant 27.1% increase in short interest during March, reaching over 7 million shares by March 31st. Despite this, the company saw insider selling from a VP and an EVP, who divested shares totaling millions of dollars. Wall Street analysts maintain a positive outlook, with an average "Buy" rating and a consensus price target of $521.60 for Linde.

feed.title: Advanced Micro Devices (AMD) Stock Hits All-Time High on 12-Day Winning Streak
feed.summary: Advanced Micro Devices (AMD) stock reached a new all-time high of $270.12, achieving a 12-day winning streak not seen since 2005. The surge is attributed to strong Q1 earnings from TSMC, AMD's chip manufacturing partner, indicating high demand for AI chips, as well as an improved broader market sentiment. Analyst price targets have also been raised ahead of AMD's Q1 earnings on May 5, driven by anticipation for its collaboration with Meta and upcoming MI400 series AI chips.

feed.title: PPG highlights 2025 performance during annual meeting of shareholders
feed.summary: PPG held its annual meeting of shareholders, where CEO Tim Knavish highlighted the company's 2025 performance, including $15.9 billion in net sales, a 2% organic sales increase, and the return of $1.4 billion to shareholders. The company also focused on digital transformation, increased sustainably advantaged products to 43% of sales, and invested $18.1 million in community engagement. Shareholders re-elected directors, approved executive compensation, and ratified the accounting firm, but voted against an independent board chair policy.

feed.title: SHAREHOLDER ALERT: Purcell & Lefkowitz LLP Announces Shareholder Investigation of ICU Medical, Inc. (NASDAQ: ICUI)
feed.summary: Purcell & Lefkowitz LLP has launched a shareholder investigation into ICU Medical, Inc. (NASDAQ: ICUI) to determine if the company's directors breached their fiduciary duties through recent corporate actions. Shareholders of ICU Medical are invited to contact the firm for more information regarding their rights and options. The law firm specializes in representing shareholders affected by securities fraud and corporate misconduct.

feed.title: Fracking Halliburton And The Big Bet South Of The Border
feed.summary: Halliburton (HAL) is expanding its operations into Argentina's Vaca Muerta shale formation through a partnership with YPF Sociedad Anónima (YPF), aiming to mitigate geopolitical risks and secure long-term revenue. This strategy involves deploying advanced electric fracturing (e-frac) technology to enhance efficiency and reduce environmental impact. The move positions Halliburton for resilience in a volatile energy market, with its stock price showing a favorable response.

feed.title: Arista Networks Inc Stock (ANET) Moved Up by 3.06% on Apr 16: Drivers Behind the Movement
feed.summary: Arista Networks Inc (ANET) stock rose by 3.06% on April 16th, driven by strong analyst sentiment and its strategic positioning in the AI infrastructure market. Recent upgrades from firms like Zacks Research and increased price targets from multiple financial institutions, including JPMorgan, reflect growing confidence. The company's expansion of its eXtra-dense Pluggable Optics (XPO) ecosystem and robust financial performance in Q4 2025 further contribute to investor optimism regarding its future growth in AI and data center networking.

feed.title: International Paper to acquire North Pacific Paper for $360 million
feed.summary: International Paper plans to acquire North Pacific Paper Company (NORPAC) from One Rock Capital Partners for $360 million. The acquisition will add NORPAC's Longview, Washington mill, which has three paper machines and approximately 500 employees, to International Paper's system. This deal is expected to increase flexibility, reduce costs, and enhance the company's ability to supply lightweight recycled containerboard, strengthening its service for West Coast customers.

feed.title: Verizon Communications Inc Stock (VZ) Moved Up by 3.03% on Apr 16: Drivers Behind the Movement
feed.summary: Verizon Communications Inc. (VZ) stock rose 3.03% on April 16, driven by its new role as the FIFA World Cup 2026 telecommunication sponsor and favorable analyst ratings. Morgan Stanley initiated coverage with a positive outlook, and another analysis reiterated a "Strong Buy" due to robust cash flow and strategic cost-saving measures. Despite this positive movement, technical indicators suggest caution, and the company faces risks including legal challenges, significant debt, and concerns about financial reporting transparency.

feed.title: General Electric Co Stock (GE) Moved Down by 4.04% on Apr 16: What Investors Need To Know
feed.summary: General Electric (GE) stock fell by 4.04% on April 16, driven by investor jitters ahead of its Q1 2026 earnings report and concerns about its premium valuation. Despite a bullish outlook for GE Aerospace with strong demand and order backlogs, market participants are re-evaluating positions, leading to a correction. Technical indicators suggest neutral to oversold conditions, while fundamental analysis highlights the company's strong performance within the Industrial Goods sector.

feed.title: BlackRock Inc Stock (BLK) Moved Down by 3.05% on Apr 16: Key Drivers Unveiled
feed.summary: BlackRock Inc.'s stock (BLK) dropped by 3.05% on April 16, despite strong Q1 2026 earnings that surpassed analyst expectations. The downturn is attributed to an ongoing legal investigation by Pomerantz LLP concerning withdrawal limits on its HPS Corporate Lending Fund, recent analyst price target cuts, and broader market caution. While BlackRock reported substantial net inflows, concerns about its premium valuation, insider selling, and mixed financial sector earnings also contributed to the stock's decline.

feed.title: Teradyne Acquires TestInsight to Expand Semiconductor Test Software Capabilities
feed.summary: Teradyne Inc. has acquired TestInsight, a semiconductor software company specializing in test development and validation tools. This acquisition aims to enhance Teradyne's semiconductor test software capabilities, particularly for complex AI chips, enabling faster product launches and improved efficiency for customers. The deal highlights the increasing importance of software automation in reducing bottlenecks and accelerating production in the rapidly advancing AI semiconductor market.

feed.title: Analysts Offer Insights on Technology Companies: Jack Henry & Associates (JKHY), Fortinet (FTNT) and Adeia (ADEA)
feed.summary: Analysts have provided coverage for several technology companies, including Jack Henry & Associates (JKHY), Fortinet (FTNT), and Adeia (ADEA). Jack Henry & Associates received a "Strong Buy" consensus with a 34.0% upside, Fortinet was rated "Hold" with a 10.9% upside, and Adeia earned a "Strong Buy" consensus with a 20.4% upside from current levels. These insights come from analysts like Jason Kupferberg of Wells Fargo, Ittai Kidron of Oppenheimer, and Scott Searle of Roth MKM, along with other firms.

feed.title: ALLO Stock Slumps As $175M Secondary Offering Hits Tape
feed.summary: Allogene Therapeutics (ALLO) stock slumped by 16.01% after announcing a $175M underwritten public offering of 87.5 million shares at $2.00 per share, significantly diluting existing shareholders. The offering, designed to fund clinical trials and R&D for its CAR-T pipeline, led to an 18% intraday price drop on increased volume. Traders are closely monitoring ALLO due to the dilution, insider selling intentions, and its high-burn, high-volatility biotech profile.

feed.title: Walmart is remodeling 12 Indiana stores with upgraded brands, services
feed.summary: Walmart is investing in remodeling 12 of its Indiana stores, including two in Indianapolis, as part of a nationwide modernization effort in 2026. The upgrades aim to enhance in-store and online shopping experiences by improving layouts, expanding healthy food options, introducing elevated brands, and offering faster services like express delivery. Stores will remain open during the remodel process.

feed.title: Booking Holdings (NASDAQ: BKNG) insiders report 10b5-1 sales of Common stock
feed.summary: Booking Holdings (NASDAQ: BKNG) has reported Form 144 sale notices for Common stock under 10b5-1 plans. The filings indicate sales of 669 shares on March 16, 2026, and 1,012 shares on February 17, 2026, associated with Glenn D Fogel and Amy J Roberts. These transactions highlight routine insider stock sales conducted through pre-arranged plans.

feed.title: S&P 500, Nasdaq 100 Hit New Records On Trump's Ceasefire Efforts - Apple (NASDAQ:AAPL), Abbott Laboratori
feed.summary: The S&P 500 and Nasdaq 100 reached new record highs on Thursday, with the S&P 500 advancing to 7,038.57 and the Nasdaq 100 rallying 0.6% to 26,359. This surge is attributed to optimism surrounding President Donald Trump's declared 10-day ceasefire between Israeli and Lebanese leaders. Despite rising oil prices due to potential Hormuz toll legislation, the market reacted positively to the ceasefire news, with the energy and tech sectors showing strong performance while healthcare declined.

feed.title: 2025-2026 Harley-Davidson Softail Models Recalled For Rear Brake Issue
feed.summary: Harley-Davidson is recalling 16,994 units of its 2025-2026 Softail models, including the Street Bob, Heritage Classic, Low Rider S, and Low Rider ST, due to a potential rear brake fluid leak. The issue stems from the rear brake lines being positioned too close to the body control module (BCM), which can cause wear and lead to a loss of rear braking performance. Dealers will replace the BCM caddy and associated hardware to create more clearance, and inspect/replace damaged brake lines.

feed.title: Devon Energy on track to enter green territory after six straight sessions of losses
feed.summary: Devon Energy (DVN) is poised to end a six-session losing streak, with its shares rising 1.77% to $46.03. The energy company had previously seen a significant drop starting April 8, losing nearly 4.08% of its value. This uptick marks a potential shift for the stock after a period of decline.

feed.title: Morgan Stanley's bitcoin ETF hits $100M in week one
feed.summary: Morgan Stanley's Bitcoin ETF has achieved a significant milestone, accumulating $100 million in investments within its first week. This rapid growth highlights growing institutional interest in Bitcoin exchange-traded funds. The information is presented in a video format by CoinDesk.

feed.title: Insider Sell: Paolo Tonucci Sells Shares of Marex Group PLC
feed.summary: Paolo Tonucci, an insider at Marex Group PLC, sold 16,666 shares of the company on April 13, 2026, reducing his holding to 1,363,357 shares. This transaction follows a period with no insider buys but three insider sells, with the stock trading at $51.37 per share, giving the company a market capitalization of $3.74 billion and a P/E ratio of 12.98.

feed.title: Dividend reinvestment boosts GSK (NYSE: GSK) executive and director holdings
feed.summary: GSK plc reported that several senior executives and non-executive directors increased their equity holdings through dividend reinvestment plans. These acquisitions of Ordinary Shares and American Depositary Shares (ADS) on April 9 and April 14, 2026, were plan-based and tied to the declared dividend, rather than discretionary open-market purchases. The transactions marginally increase insider exposure to GSK equity, aligning leadership and board members with shareholders.

feed.title: International Paper's $360M NORPAC deal adds West Coast mill
feed.summary: International Paper (NYSE: IP) announced its agreement to acquire North Pacific Paper Company (NORPAC) for $360 million. This acquisition, subject to regulatory approval, will add NORPAC's Longview, Washington mill, its three machines, and approximately 500 employees, which annually produce about 1 million tons of containerboard and related grades. The deal aims to expand IP's West Coast capacity, enhance system flexibility, reduce costs, and meet the growing demand for recycled containerboard.

feed.title: West Pharmaceutical Services to Report Q1 Results April 23
feed.summary: West Pharmaceutical Services, Inc. (NYSE: WST) announced it will release its first-quarter 2026 financial results on Thursday, April 23, before market open. The company will also host a conference call to discuss the results and business outlook, with a live webcast and registration required for participants wishing to ask questions. West Pharmaceutical Services specializes in injectable drug administration solutions and services, operating globally with over 10,000 employees and reporting $3.07 billion in net sales for fiscal year 2025.

feed.title: Albemarle stock hits 52-week high at 206.07 USD
feed.summary: Albemarle Corporation's stock reached a 52-week high of $206.07, demonstrating significant growth with a 259% total return over the past year. While InvestingPro analysis suggests the stock is currently slightly overvalued, Truist Securities has maintained a Buy rating due to strong lithium pricing and demand from electric vehicle and grid storage markets. The company also recently amended its credit agreement and increased a debt tender offer.

feed.title: BNY Mellon (BK) Q1 2026 Earnings Call Transcript
feed.summary: BNY Mellon reported a strong Q1 2026 with record revenue of $5.4 billion, up 13% year-over-year, and earnings per share of $2.24, marking 42% growth. The company achieved significant operating leverage and pre-tax margin expansion, driven by broad-based growth across its Securities Services and Markets and Wealth Services segments. Management highlighted the strategic importance of AI initiatives and integrated platforms, raising its full-year 2026 revenue and net interest income guidance and authorizing a new $10 billion share repurchase program.

feed.title: Seagate lands on J.P. Morgan's 'Positive Catalyst Watch' due to strength of HDD market
feed.summary: J.P. Morgan has added Seagate Technology to its "Positive Catalyst Watch" list, citing the company's strong position in the HDD market. The firm believes Seagate is well-positioned to benefit from robust data center demand and favorable pricing trends. This update underlines a positive outlook for Seagate's future performance.

feed.title: What to Expect From Duke Energy's Q1 2026 Earnings Report
feed.summary: Duke Energy Corporation (DUK) is set to release its Q1 2026 earnings on May 5, with analysts projecting a 3.4% increase in EPS to $1.82 per share from the prior year. Despite trailing the S&P 500 and the Utilities Select Sector SPDR ETF, DUK has a "Moderate Buy" rating from analysts, who anticipate a 9.5% upside from its current price. The company recently invested $600,000 to bolster North Carolina's energy workforce.

feed.title: Jim Cramer Discusses Big Humana (HUM) Business
feed.summary: Jim Cramer highlighted Humana (HUM) due to its significant Medicare Advantage business, noting its stock performance after the Trump Administration announced increased Medicare Advantage payments for 2027. Humana's shares saw an 11% gain following this announcement, despite a prior downgrade by Barclays. The article suggests that while Humana has potential, some AI stocks may offer higher returns in a shorter timeframe.

feed.title: Stocks making the biggest moves midday: Abbott Labs, AMD, Charles Schwab, On Semi & more
feed.summary: Advanced Micro Devices (AMD) surged over 7% after Bernstein raised its price target, while Aehr Test Systems also saw an 11% jump due to a large AI production order. Conversely, Abbott Laboratories tumbled nearly 7% on weak second-quarter guidance, and Charles Schwab fell 5% after its Q1 revenue missed estimates. Other companies like PepsiCo and PPG Industries advanced, while Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing and U.S. Bancorp saw declines despite some positive results.

feed.title: Can Jabil's Alliance With Sivers for AI Data Center Boost Its Shares?
feed.summary: Jabil Inc. has partnered with Sivers Semiconductors AB to develop ultra-high-speed, energy-efficient optical transceivers for AI data centers, aiming to meet future demands for faster networking. This collaboration, along with other partnerships, solidifies Jabil's role in advanced AI infrastructure development, competing with companies like Celestica and Flex. Despite past share underperformance, Jabil exhibits strong financial estimates for fiscal 2026 and 2027, earning it a Zacks Rank #1 (Strong Buy).

feed.title: Texas Instruments Hit With Patent Lawsuit by Lock Semiconductor
feed.summary: Lock Semiconductor LLC has filed a patent infringement lawsuit against Texas Instruments Inc., alleging unauthorized use of protected methods in its microcontroller and processor products. The complaint, filed in the US District Court for the Eastern District of Texas, claims TI was aware of the patents through competition with original patent owners, Freescale Semiconductor Inc. (later acquired by NXP Semiconductors NV). The lawsuit cites US Patent Nos. 7,952,401, 8,117,400, and 9,355,280, with the first two relating to methods for a standby state.

feed.title: Texas Instruments Hit With Patent Lawsuit by Lock Semiconductor
feed.summary: Lock Semiconductor LLC has filed a patent infringement lawsuit against Texas Instruments Inc. (TI) alleging the company used protected methods in its microcontroller and processor products. The lawsuit, filed in the US District Court for the Eastern District of Texas, claims TI was aware of the infringed patents (Nos. 7,952,401, 8,117,400, and 9,355,280) through its competition with original patent owners Freescale Semiconductor Inc. and NXP Semiconductors NV.

feed.title: Citron Calls It: The Most Obvious Mispricing In Quantum Stocks Right Now
feed.summary: Infleqtion (INFQ) shares rallied significantly between March 30 and recent peaks, leading Citron Research to highlight its strong position in the quantum computing space, particularly in relation to Nvidia's initiatives. Despite being selected twice by Nvidia for quantum roles, Infleqtion trades at roughly half the market capitalization of Rigetti Computing (RGTI), which was not selected, suggesting a significant mispricing to Citron. The company boasts strong organic growth, substantial cash reserves, zero debt, and major government contracts.

feed.title: Sands Surpasses the Primary People, Communities and Planet Ambitions Set for Its 2021-2025 Reporting Period
feed.summary: Las Vegas Sands has exceeded its 2021-2025 environmental, social, and governance (ESG) goals, including investments in workforce development, community volunteer hours, and carbon emissions reduction. The company invested over $270 million in workforce development and logged more than 290,000 volunteer hours. Sands also reduced its scope 1 and 2 emissions by 54% from a 2018 base year, surpassing its targets.

feed.title: +1.89% for Analog Devices stock as buyers keep price at top of weekly range
feed.summary: Analog Devices (ADI) stock gained 1.89%, trading at the top of its weekly range. The stock is in a strong bullish trend, well above major moving averages, with momentum indicators confirming sustained buying interest despite approaching overbought conditions. Analysts project a trading range of $347.70 to $362.20 for the coming week, with a high probability of further increases toward its 52-week high of $363.20.

feed.title: Home BancShares (NYSE:HOMB) Shares Gap Down - Time to Sell?
feed.summary: Home BancShares (NYSE:HOMB) experienced a share price gap down, opening at $26.70 after closing at $27.67, and trading down about 1.9%. Analysts currently hold a consensus "Hold" rating with an average target price of $32.40. The company's Q1 EPS matched estimates, but revenue missed, and it maintains a quarterly dividend of $0.21.

feed.title: Earnings call transcript: BNY Mellon surpasses Q1 2026 forecasts with strong EPS
feed.summary: BNY Mellon reported strong first-quarter 2026 earnings, with EPS of $2.25 surpassing forecasts by 16.58% and revenue reaching $5.41 billion against a projected $5.17 billion. The company attributes its performance to record revenue growth in Securities Services and Market and Wealth Services, significant investments in AI and technology, and strong client engagement. Despite a slight pre-market stock dip, BNY Mellon remains near its 52-week high and increased its full-year 2026 revenue and net interest income outlook.

feed.title: Insider Sell: Milton Morris Sells Shares of Nordson Corp (NDSN)
feed.summary: Milton Morris, a Director at Nordson Corp (NDSN), sold 245 shares of the company on April 15, 2026, bringing his total ownership to 2,656 shares. This transaction is part of a trend of nine insider sells and no buys at Nordson Corp over the past year. The company's stock is currently trading at $273.87, which is considered fairly valued based on its GF Value.

feed.title: Exelon (EXC) Shares Decline Following PECO Rate Filing Withdrawa
feed.summary: Exelon (EXC) shares fell by 1% to $47.35 after its regulated utility, PECO, withdrew its rate proceedings. This development has raised investor concerns about the regulatory environment and its potential impact on Exelon's revenue and operational strategies. Despite a moderate GF Score™ of 66/100 and strengths in profitability and growth, the company's financial strength rating of 3/10 suggests caution for investors.

feed.title: Palo Alto Networks founder applies to invest in California bank
feed.summary: Nir Zuk, founder of Palo Alto Networks, submitted an application to acquire voting shares in DMG Bancshares, the holding company for Liberty Bank in Irvine, California. Zuk's investment could serve as a platform to showcase the use of artificial intelligence tools in financial services, following his previous venture with an AI-based banking platform in Israel. This move aligns with a broader trend of tech billionaires and firms, including Palmer Luckey, OpenAI, and Elon Musk, expanding into the financial services sector.

feed.title: Immix Biopharma (NASDAQ:IMMX) Trading Down 4.6% - Time to Sell?
feed.summary: Immix Biopharma (NASDAQ:IMMX) saw its stock price drop by 4.6% during intraday trading, with unusually low volume. The company, a clinical-stage immuno-oncology firm, traded at $9.57 and currently has a market capitalization of $521 million. Analyst ratings are mixed, with a consensus of "Moderate Buy" but individual price targets ranging widely, and the company recently missed Q1 EPS estimates while institutional ownership remains low at about 11%.

feed.title: Imperial Oil pipeline spills 843,000 litres in northern Alberta, clean up underway
feed.summary: Imperial Oil is dealing with a significant oil spill in northern Alberta, near Cold Lake, where 843,000 litres of product leaked from a pipeline. Clean-up operations are currently underway. The incident highlights concerns regarding oil and gas operations and their environmental impact.

feed.title: Guarantor: JPMorgan Chase & Co.
feed.summary: JPMorgan Chase Financial Company LLC has issued $1,000,000 in Review Notes linked to the performance of Class A Common Stock of Palantir Technologies Inc., Common Stock of Tesla, Inc., and Class A Common Stock of CrowdStrike Holdings, Inc., due April 13, 2029. These notes are fully and unconditionally guaranteed by JPMorgan Chase & Co. and are designed for investors seeking an early exit with a premium if predefined call values are met, but they carry significant risks including potential loss of principal.

feed.title: Pfizer-Backed EV-209 Trial Targets Bladder Preservation in High-Need Cancer Segment
feed.summary: Pfizer Inc. (PFE) has provided an update on its Phase 2 EV-209 study, which aims to evaluate a combination of enfortumab vedotin and pembrolizumab for bladder preservation in patients with muscle-invasive bladder cancer. This open-label, single-arm trial seeks to control tumors and allow patients to avoid bladder removal surgery, thereby improving their quality of life. The study, led by Astellas Pharma with Pfizer as a key collaborator, could significantly impact oncology treatment by establishing a bladder-preserving option in a high-need cancer segment.

feed.title: Bruno Mars Pokes Fun at Gambling Debt Rumors on Opening Night of Tour
feed.summary: Bruno Mars addressed ongoing rumors about his gambling debt during the opening night of his "The Romantic Tour" with Anderson .Paak in Las Vegas. He and .Paak lightheartedly joked about the alleged debt, with Mars declaring he was "debt free" and had "paid the casino off a long time ago." This follows a busy period for Mars, which included opening a cocktail lounge and being honored with a Las Vegas street renaming and key to the city.

feed.title: +1.89% for Analog Devices stock as price pushes to upper weekly range
feed.summary: Analog Devices (ADI) stock saw a 1.89% increase, pushing its price to the upper weekly range. The company's stock is trading near all-time highs with strong bullish momentum, though technical indicators suggest overbought conditions. Analysts project a trading range of $347.50 to $360.50 for the week, with further upside expected if $360.50 is breached.

feed.title: Guarantor: JPMorgan Chase & Co.
feed.summary: JPMorgan Chase Financial Company LLC has issued $578,000 in Auto Callable Contingent Interest Notes, fully and unconditionally guaranteed by JPMorgan Chase & Co. These notes are linked to the performance of the Russell 2000® Index, the VanEck® Semiconductor ETF, and the State Street® SPDR® S&P® Regional Banking ETF. Investors can receive contingent interest payments if the underlying assets meet certain conditions, but risk losing principal if conditions are not met.
